---
title: "About Me"
about:
  id: me
  template: broadside
  image: img/profile.jpeg
---

:::{#me}

## Goals
To become a professor and researcher of political science. 

## Education

Bachelors - Political Science, received 2024 from Montclair State University.

Masters - Data Analytics, Expected 2026 from University of Massachusetts.

## Experience

:::
